naming_convention: `name` is always non-null. When `name` equals the file stem (e.g. "r1c2"), the frame still awaits a human-vetted descriptive label. When `name` differs (e.g. an Art Deco label like "SunburstCorner"), it's a curated label.

derived.description: Raster render of r1c1 from the NEXUS IRIS design handoff (the frame chosen for the Gilded splash window border).

Measured multi-band slicing geometry (safe stretch zones + per-band ink centers) for all nine frames, from the NEXUS IRIS design handoff. Enables distortion-free frame resizing; do not replace with naive CSS border-image 9-slice.
